---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One sentence describing what you want.

## Motivation

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve? What is your current workaround, if any?

## Proposed solution

Describe what the API or behavior should look like. A rough Go snippet or HTTP example helps.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why they did not fit your needs.

## Additional context

Links to relevant RFCs, specs, or existing libraries that implement something similar.
